SISTURN.GENERIC: Some flowers would liven it up a bit.
SISTURN.SOME_FLOWERS: A few more flowers should do the trick.
I believe flowers are a traditional offering to the deceased.
SISTURN.LOTS_OF_FLOWERS: The flowers seem to give off an aromatic effect.

SISTURN.SOME_FLOWERS: Well... I guess it wouldn't take too long to gather a few flowers.
SISTURN.GENERIC: Death should be the farthest thing from a child's mind...
SISTURN.LOTS_OF_FLOWERS: I hope she finds some comfort in this.

SISTURN.GENERIC: Better pay our respects, eh Lucy?
SISTURN.SOME_FLOWERS: Think it could use a few more flowers, eh?

SISTURN.GENERIC: A pyre would've been more fun.
SISTURN.LOTS_OF_FLOWERS: I guess it's kind of pretty...
SISTURN.SOME_FLOWERS: You're doing it wrong, those flowers aren't dry enough to burn!
Looks a bit sparse. Maybe I can chip in a flower or two.
SISTURN.GENERIC: Nothin' stronger than the bond between sisters.

SISTURN.LOTS_OF_FLOWERS: Maybe I should keep my distance...
SISTURN.GENERIC: A touching tribute to a treasured twin.
SISTURN.SOME_FLOWERS: A flowery addition for our apparition!

SISTURN.GENERIC: A small langhús for the ghostly warrior to regain her strength.
Is like tiny house for bird! But why is little pot here?
SISTURN.LOTS_OF_FLOWERS: Wolfgang like the flowers, but why is little pot floating?
SISTURN.SOME_FLOWERS: Wolfgang will find more flowers for tiny house!
Perhaps I should pay my respects as well.
SISTURN.LOTS_OF_FLOWERS: It has a strangely calming effect.
SISTURN.GENERIC: I can't help but wonder... no, it couldn't be.

WENDY.ANNOUNCE_SISTURN_FULL: Now Abigail can find her way back to me faster.

SISTURN.GENERIC: It's a memorial to my sister... but it's so bare...
SISTURN.LOTS_OF_FLOWERS: I won't let you fade away, Abigail. Never.
We feel warm and fuzzy... well, more than usual.

SISTURN.SOME_FLOWERS: If I find some flowers I'll bring them back here.

RECIPE_DESC.SISTURN: A place to rest your weary soul.
